name: Enhanced Protein Translation Underlies Improved Metabolic and Physical Adaptations to Different Exercise Training Modes in Young and Old Humans
short_name: Exercise training modes in young and old humans
summary: A 12-week human exercise-training study comparing high-intensity interval, resistance, and combined training in young and older adults with skeletal-muscle mitochondrial respiration, mitochondrial protein synthesis, proteomics, VO2 peak, insulin-sensitivity, lean-mass, and strength endpoints.
